action.reasoning: Observation: replay (200/task) gave avg_acc 0.465 (val 0.473), strong on later tasks (0.9) but early tasks ~0.3 showing residual forgetting. Curves indicate training proceeds but logging sparse. Analysis: buffer helps vs naive (0.019) but insufficient size, SGD+lr=0.01 suboptimal for continual FT of pretrained ResNet (overshooting later tasks), 8 epochs/task leaves room. Decision: scale memory_per_task=400 (total buffer 4k still fits), switch to Adam(lr=1e-3), epochs=12/task, add per-task CosineAnnealingLR for stable convergence, log more frequently for better curves. Expect ~0.55+ avg_acc. Update train.py fully (fix truncation), keep model/predict, run training then submit_eval.
